Trial Name.value: Olaparib combined with abiraterone in patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer: a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 2 trial

Authors.value: Noel Clarke, Pawel Wiechno, Boris Alekseev, Nuria Sala, Robert Jones, Ivo Kocak, Vincenzo Emanuele Chiuri, Jacek Jassem, Aude Fléchon, Charles Redfern, Carsten Goessl, Joseph Burgents, Robert Kozarski, Darren Hodgson, Maria Learoyd, Fred Saad

Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1.value: PARP inhibitor and androgen synthesis inhibitor

Treatment Arm 1 Regimen.value: Olaparib 300 mg twice daily plus abiraterone 1000 mg once daily and prednisone or prednisolone 5 mg twice daily

HRR Mutation Status.value: HRR mutation, wild-type HRR, HRR partially characterised

Genes Screened.value: ATM, BARD1, BRCA1, BRCA2, BRIP1, CDK12, CHEK1, CHEK2, FANCL, PALB2, RAD51B, RAD51C, RAD51D, RAD54L, PPP2R2A

Secondary Endpoint(s).value: Safety and tolerability; time to second progression (PFS2); overall survival; radiographic objective response; duration of response; malignant soft tissue objective response; time to first subsequent anticancer therapy (TFST); time to second subsequent anticancer therapy (TSST); confirmed prostate-specific antigen response; change in circulating tumour cell count; health-related quality of life (HRQOL)

Type of Combination Therapy.value: PARP inhibitor plus androgen synthesis inhibitor
